---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for OpenBrigade
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.  
_e.g. "I find it frustrating when..."_

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Use Case

Who would benefit from this feature and in what scenario?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
